name: Spectral gap
definition: Real-part separation between retained slow eigenvalues and the leading discarded eigenvalue of an autonomous generator.
norm_convention: spectral ordering by descending real part
estimation_procedure: Order eigenvalues by real part and compute the retained-discarded separation.

name: Singular gap
definition: Difference between the last retained and first discarded singular values of a windowed transfer operator.
estimation_procedure: Compute an SVD per window and take sigma_m - sigma_{m+1}.

name: Projector deformation
definition: Operator-norm deviation between the estimated and baseline slow carrier projectors.

name: Coherent projector deformation
definition: Window-to-window or baseline-to-window deformation of coherent transport carriers.
estimation_procedure: Compare coherent source/target projectors across windows.

name: Block residual norm
definition: Norm of the off-block residual after extracting a block-diagonal reduced model.
estimation_procedure: Project onto the carrier, zero out within-block entries, then take the residual norm.

name: Leakage trajectory
definition: Observed finite-horizon leakage sequence for the claimed subsystem decomposition.
norm_convention: operator 2-norm or normalized state-energy leakage, branch dependent
estimation_procedure: Evaluate the benchmark-specific leakage observable on the sampled horizon.
acceptance_tolerance: interpreted through autonomy horizon and gate thresholds

name: Autonomy horizon
definition: Largest sampled time or window index for which leakage remains below eta.
estimation_procedure: Scan the leakage trajectory against eta and retain the largest admissible sample.

name: Cross-subsystem transfer rate
definition: Off-block transport or coupling rate within the reduced carrier.
estimation_procedure: Measure off-block reduced-model coupling or coherent transfer.

name: Reduced model forecast error
definition: Mismatch between projected full evolution and reduced-model evolution.
estimation_procedure: Compare projected propagators against reduced propagators on the same time grid.

name: Transient amplification score
definition: Finite-horizon amplification beyond decay predicted by the spectral abscissa.

name: Ensemble averaged leakage
definition: Mean leakage across stochastic trajectories or benchmark ensembles.
estimation_procedure: Average leakage over samples or replicates.

name: Leakage variance
definition: Variance of leakage across an ensemble or bootstrap.
estimation_procedure: Compute sample variance across trajectories or replicates.

name: Affine law regression coefficients
definition: Estimated coefficients for the L1, L2, and L3 leakage-law families.
estimation_procedure: Fit L1, L2, and L3 on the observed leakage data with held-out evaluation.
acceptance_tolerance: extension laws should beat weaker baselines when justified

name: Transportability metrics
definition: Metrics comparing coherent, stochastic, or parameter-shifted behavior against simpler surrogates.
norm_convention: ratio or relative difference conventions per benchmark
estimation_procedure: Compare coherent runs against frozen surrogates or held-out parameter continuation.

name: Coordinate sensitivity metrics
definition: Sensitivity of core observables to admissible coordinate transforms.
estimation_procedure: Apply orthogonal transforms, recompute observables, and summarize induced changes.

name: Numerical refinement metrics
definition: Variation of core observables across refinement levels.
estimation_procedure: Repeat the analysis at multiple resolutions and report the spread.
